html:
Exclusive to:

Ancient Moon Statues are naturally spawning objects exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They can be found in the Ancient Archive biome.

They can be mined to drop 1 Thulecite and 1 Moon Rock with a 5% chance to drop one extra Moon Rock.

Trivia

  • The Ancient Moon Statues were introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Source
Can be Mined
Ancient Archive

Miscellaneous
"archive_moon_statue"
“These magnificent moon statues have me waxing poetic.”
–Wilson
“Huh. These look different from the other statues down here.”
–Willow
“Ha! Wolfgang could carry big rock all by himself!”
–Wolfgang
“This place feels rather like a tomb.”
–Wendy
“THE FLESHLINGS WISELY RECOGNIZED THE SUPERIORITY OF THE MOON”
–WX-78
“These chambers appear to pre-date the rest of the ruins.”
–Wickerbottom
“The ones carryin' the full moon sure got the short end of the stick, eh?”
–Woodie
“How did I not know of this place? Did They know?”
–Maxwell
“These peöple önce praised Mani.”
–Wigfrid
“Maybe the moon was important to them?”
–Webber
“They seemed to think quite highly of the moon.”
–Warly
“Friends of Night Ball”
–Wormwood
“All that material wasted on some decoration.”
–Winona
“My, that looks heavy.”
–Wortox
“Look just like moon!”
–Wurt
“Well, they look happier than the statues outside... I think.”
–Walter
“Relics from a distant time.”
–Wanda
Ancient Moon Statues are naturally spawning objects exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They can be found in the Ancient Archive biome.
They can be mined to drop 1 Thulecite and 1 Moon Rock with a 5% chance to drop one extra Moon Rock.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Ancient Moon Statues were introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tượng Mặt Trăng Cổ là vật thể sinh sản tự nhiên độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Chúng có thể được tìm thấy trong quần thể Kho Lưu trữ Cổ đại.

'''Ancient Moon Statues''' are naturally spawning objects exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. They can be found in the [[Ancient Archive]] biome.

They can be mined to drop 1 [[Thulecite]] and 1 [[Moon Rock]] with a 5% chance to drop one extra [[Moon Rock]].

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}}Trivia ==
* The Ancient Moon Statues were introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Forgotten Knowledge|Forgotten Knowledge]]'' update.
